blockingIssues.description: calculate_decay() returns decay factor > 1.0 when now < last_reinforcement (negative elapsed time). Code: let days_elapsed = (now - last_reinforcement).num_days() as f64; base.powf(negative) returns value > 1.0 when days_elapsed is negative.
MemoryEntry lacks 'confidence', 'deprecation_info', and 'superseded_by' fields. Deprecation module cannot integrate with memory system as specified.
BM25 search stream generates Uuid::new_v4() for results instead of actual memory entry IDs. Documented as 'Placeholder' in code. Breaks RRF fusion for BM25 stream.
RerankableCandidates trait creates MemoryEntry with empty fields but is never called - dead code. Same BM25 UUID bug as triple_stream.
search() method does not filter by source_episode_id even though MemoryQuery has this field. get_by_provenance() provides provenance filtering separately.
FIXED in commit 6192803. repository field now uses self.repository.clone().

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that some blocking issues are working-as-intended MVP placeholders. The BM25 UUID generation and recall-to-memory linking limitations are documented in code comments as 'placeholder' and 'In real implementation'. These are acceptable for MVP if flagged upfront.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: triple_stream.rs line 520 comment: 'Placeholder' and line 518: 'In real implementation, recall results would link to memory entries'. Reviewer flagged as blocking but this is documented MVP limitation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The BM25 UUID bug is a documented MVP placeholder, not an oversight. Code comment explicitly states 'In real implementation, recall results would link to memory entries'. This requires vector search integration to fix properly.
MemoryEntry schema would need breaking changes (add confidence, deprecation_info, superseded_by fields) to integrate deprecation module. This is a design decision for orchestrator.
Negative time edge case (future 'now' relative to 'last_reinforcement') is unlikely in practice but violates documented contract. Simple fix: clamp days_elapsed to 0.0 minimum.

commonBugAcrossFeatures.description: memory-pattern-learning FIXED. Remaining issues are independent or documented MVP limitations.
